title: Gladiators
content:
No broken visor, emptied glove
        abandoned cudgel, opened net
        - only gathering spots on spreading sand.

        Clang of cymbals
        wrench of flesh,
        death is a morsel
        delectably met.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Gladiators", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
